_publications._publicationTitle: Systems Biology Approaches Reveal Potential Phenotype-Modifier Genes in Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: HPO selection provided 1697 genes related to NF1 phenotype (OMIM 162200), whilst GO filter yielded 1449 genes included in the same ontologies previously selected for the NF1 gene.
details: HPO selection provided 1697 genes related to NF1 phenotype (OMIM 162200)
